title: drynaria wallichii
intro: Drynaria wallichii, also known as the Chinese tuckahoe or Pachyma, is a type of terrestrial fern native to tropical Asia. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Drynaria wallichii include its ability to enhance immune function, improve cognitive function, and treat various diseases such as rheumatism, fever, and respiratory infections. Drynaria wallichii is commonly prepared as a decoction, tablet, or capsule, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
